title: Water Can Boil and Freeze at the Same Time
script_summary: Exploring the triple point of water where ice, liquid, and vapor coexist.

segments.voiceover: Imagine water boiling and freezing at the same time!
This happens at the triple point, a unique state where ice, liquid, and vapor coexist perfectly.
At about 273.16 Kelvin and 611.657 Pascals, this equilibrium occurs. Sounds wild, right?
This isn’t just a kitchen trick. It’s grounded in standard thermodynamics and backed by science.
This fascinating phenomenon showcases nature’s complexity and the beauty of phase transitions.
Curious about more amazing science secrets? Hit that like button and follow for more!
